description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow featuring a flat roof and a spacious, open-plan layout. The exterior is clad in light wood paneling with large floor-to-ceiling windows that provide ample natural light and views of the surrounding area. The structure includes a prominent outdoor deck area with a swimming pool, a hot tub, and a green terrace with potted plants. The interior is divided into several rooms, including a kitchen, living area, bedrooms, and bathrooms, all visible through the transparent glass walls. There is an exterior staircase leading up to the main entrance and a covered patio area with outdoor seating. The design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a strong connection between indoor and outdoor living.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with wood paneling, large glass windows, an outdoor deck, pool, and open-plan interior spaces.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, outdoor deck with pool, hot tub, and green terrace, as well as large glass windows revealing the interior layout.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the depth of the structure, the pool area, and the arrangement of rooms with visible glass walls and wood paneling.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade with grouped windows, a small covered area, and the continuation of the wood paneling and glass design.
description_view_3: Side view featuring the exterior staircase, hot tub, and a clear look at the flat roof and the arrangement of rooms along the side.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped side windows
